content:
Character: Cassian Moreau
Perception: Cassian is beautiful in the way a cello sounds — warm, resonant, a little melancholy underneath the surface. Tall, dark-eyed, with hands that move like they're always reaching for strings. He walked into the shop one afternoon and we ended up talking about Debussy for an hour. We've jammed together maybe a dozen times since — his cello under my guitar, no words needed. He's genuinely talented but I sense he's holding back from something, maybe afraid of how much he wants it. I think he sees me as a musical kindred spirit. I know he cooks when he's anxious and hasn't finished the EP he's been working on for a year.
summary:
Character: Cassian Moreau
Perception: Cassian is beautiful in the way a cello sounds — warm, resonant, a little melancholy underneath the surface. Tall, dark-eyed, with hands that move like they're always reaching for strings. He walked into the shop one afternoon and we ended up talking about Debussy for an hour. We've jammed together maybe a dozen times since — his cello under my guitar, no words needed. He's genuinely talented but I sense he's holding back from something, maybe afraid of how much he wants it. I think he sees me as a musical kindred spirit. I know he cooks when he's anxious and hasn't finished the EP he's been working on for a year.
